rationale: All required content is present and correct: 'Dr. Maya Chen' bold white, 'CLIMATE SCIENTIST, NOAA' in muted gray, teal #00C2A8 vertical accent bar, positioned lower-left near the specified safe area, on the dark #0E1116 background. The filmstrip matches the choreography: empty first tile, accent bar alone at ~0.5s leading the entrance, full lockup by ~1s, steady hold through ~4.2s, then a fade-out in the final tile with the 100% still fully empty — no teleports or unintended freezes. Typography is tight with clear hierarchy (heavy name, letter-spaced caps role), clean alignment to the accent bar, and nothing clipped or overlapping. Reads as a genuine broadcast lower third I would ship as-is.
